author: Ciprian-Florin Ifrim
name: 106.2M Binary U-Net — 1-bit + NeoMuon + 4x relu² MLP + FP8 QAT + Smear + LZMA
blurb: 15L 768d binary U-Net transformer ({-1,+1}, 1 bit/param) with relu² 4x MLP, SmearGate, factored tied embedding (254-dim), FP8 QAT, poly5 softcap, YaRN 2048, NeoMuon optimizer. 106.2M params in 15.67MB. Trained 50k steps (~2h) unconstrained. Sliding eval stride=16 T=0.90.
